titles.en: Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse
Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي : أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ طَافَ عَلَى رَاحِلَتِهِ وَ اِسْتَلَمَ اَلْحَجَرَ بِمِحْجَنِهِ وَ سَعَى عَلَيْهَا بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ.
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي : أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ طَافَ عَلَى رَاحِلَتِهِ وَ اِسْتَلَمَ اَلْحَجَرَ بِمِحْجَنِهِ وَ سَعَى عَلَيْهَا بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ.

segments:
Hadith.2818 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated:
"I heard Abu Ja'far (as) say: My father told me that the Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, performed tawaf on his mount, touched the Black Stone (Hajar al-Aswad) with his staff, and performed sa‘y between Safa and Marwah on it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2818 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated:
"I heard Abu Ja'far (as) say: My father told me that the Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, performed tawaf on his mount, touched the Black Stone (Hajar al-Aswad) with his staff, and performed sa‘y between Safa and Marwah on it."

titles.en: Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse

segments: 2819 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : «أَنَّهُ كَانَ يُقَبِّلُ اَلْمِحْجَنَ ».
arabic.text: 2819 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : «أَنَّهُ كَانَ يُقَبِّلُ اَلْمِحْجَنَ ».

segments: Hadith.2819 - And in another narration: "It is mentioned that he would kiss the staff (mihjan)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2819 - And in another narration: "It is mentioned that he would kiss the staff (mihjan)."

titles.en: Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse

segments:
اَلطَّوَافِ.
وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ عَنِ اَلرَّبِيعِ بْنِ خُثَيْمٍ : أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَفْعَلُ ذَلِكَ كُلَّمَا بَلَغَ إِلَى اَلرُّكْنِ اَلْيَمَانِيِّ.
arabic.text:
اَلطَّوَافِ.
وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ عَنِ اَلرَّبِيعِ بْنِ خُثَيْمٍ : أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَفْعَلُ ذَلِكَ كُلَّمَا بَلَغَ إِلَى اَلرُّكْنِ اَلْيَمَانِيِّ.

segments:
Hadith.2820 - It is narrated from Abu Basir:
"Imam Abu Abdullah (as) fell ill, so he instructed his attendants to carry him and circumambulate the Kaaba with him. He ordered them to drag his foot on the ground so that his feet would touch the ground during the circumambulation."
And in another narration by Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl from Al-Rabi ibn Khuthaym:
"He would do this whenever he reached the Yemeni Corner (al-Rukn al-Yamani)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2820 - It is narrated from Abu Basir:
"Imam Abu Abdullah (as) fell ill, so he instructed his attendants to carry him and circumambulate the Kaaba with him. He ordered them to drag his foot on the ground so that his feet would touch the ground during the circumambulation."
And in another narration by Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl from Al-Rabi ibn Khuthaym:
"He would do this whenever he reached the Yemeni Corner (al-Rukn al-Yamani)."

narratorChain.raw: 2820 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ : أَنَّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مَرِضَ فَأَمَرَ غِلْمَانَهُ أَنْ يَحْمِلُوهُ وَ يَطُوفُوا بِهِ فَأَمَرَهُمْ أَنْ يُخَطُّوا بِرِجْلِهِ اَلْأَرْضَ حَتَّى تَمَسَّ اَلْأَرْضَ قَدَمَاهُ فِي

parts.text: أَبِي بَصِيرٍ : أَنَّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مَرِضَ فَأَمَرَ غِلْمَانَهُ أَنْ يَحْمِلُوهُ
يَطُوفُوا بِهِ فَأَمَرَهُمْ أَنْ يُخَطُّوا بِرِجْلِهِ اَلْأَرْضَ حَتَّى تَمَسَّ اَلْأَرْضَ قَدَمَاهُ

titles.en: Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse

segments:
Hadith.2821 - Ishaq ibn Ammar asked Imam Abu Ibrahim (as) about a severely ill person who is unable to perform circumambulation around the Kaaba.
The Imam (as) replied: "No, but he should be carried and circumambulated with."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2821 - Ishaq ibn Ammar asked Imam Abu Ibrahim (as) about a severely ill person who is unable to perform circumambulation around the Kaaba.
The Imam (as) replied: "No, but he should be carried and circumambulated with."

narratorChain.raw: 2821 - وَ سَأَلَ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلْمَرِيضِ اَلْمَغْلُوبِ يُطَافُ عَنْهُ بِالْكَعْبَةِ فَقَالَ

parts.text: سَأَلَ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ :

titles.en: Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse

segments: رِوَايَةِ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «اَلْكَسِيرُ يُحْمَلُ فَيَرْمِي اَلْجِمَارَ وَ اَلْمَبْطُونُ يُرْمَى عَنْهُ وَ يُصَلَّى عَنْهُ».
arabic.text: رِوَايَةِ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «اَلْكَسِيرُ يُحْمَلُ فَيَرْمِي اَلْجِمَارَ وَ اَلْمَبْطُونُ يُرْمَى عَنْهُ وَ يُصَلَّى عَنْهُ».

segments:
Hadith.2822 - In a narration by Muawiyah ibn Ammar from Imam Abu Abdullah (as):
"The injured person (who cannot walk) should be carried to throw the pebbles at the Jamara, while for the person afflicted with severe illness (such as diarrhea), the stoning can be done on their behalf, and prayers can also be performed on their behalf."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2822 - In a narration by Muawiyah ibn Ammar from Imam Abu Abdullah (as):
"The injured person (who cannot walk) should be carried to throw the pebbles at the Jamara, while for the person afflicted with severe illness (such as diarrhea), the stoning can be done on their behalf, and prayers can also be performed on their behalf."

narratorChain.raw: وَفِي رِوَايَةِ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

parts.text: َفِي رِوَايَةِ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on the Tawaf of the Sick and Those Carried Without an Excuse

segments: «فِي اَلصِّبْيَانِ يُطَافُ بِهِمْ وَ يُرْمَى عَنْهُمْ ».
arabic.text: «فِي اَلصِّبْيَانِ يُطَافُ بِهِمْ وَ يُرْمَى عَنْهُمْ ».

segments: Hadith.2823 - Imam (as) said: "For young children, they are carried for the circumambulation (Tawaf), and the stoning (Ramy) is performed on their behalf."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2823 - Imam (as) said: "For young children, they are carried for the circumambulation (Tawaf), and the stoning (Ramy) is performed on their behalf."
